howItWorks.intro: This apr calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: APR accounts for fees by calculating the rate on the net amount received
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What is APR?
faq.answer: Annual Percentage Rate includes the interest rate plus fees, giving you the true cost of borrowing. It is always equal to or higher than the stated interest rate.

faq.question: Why is APR different from interest rate?
faq.answer: APR factors in origination fees, closing costs, and other charges. A 6% loan with $500 in fees on a $20,000 loan has an APR higher than 6%.

faq.question: Which is more important, rate or APR?
faq.answer: APR is better for comparing loans because it includes all costs. However, if you plan to refinance or pay off early, the monthly payment matters more.

faq.question: What fees are included in APR?
faq.answer: Origination fees, discount points, mortgage insurance, and some closing costs. Not included: appraisal fees, title insurance, or prepaid items.
